summary: Clean, visually appealing landing page with clear value proposition and prominent CTAs. The hero section effectively communicates the product's core benefits, but lacks social proof and specific feature details above the fold that could increase conversion confidence.
positives: Strong visual hierarchy with clear headline and subheadline explaining product value
Dual CTA strategy (Try Free vs Buy Now) caters to different user intent levels
30-day money back guarantee reduces purchase anxiety
Consistent brand colors (pink/purple) create memorable visual identity
Simple navigation with minimal cognitive load (FAQ, Blog only)
Free trial prominently featured reduces barrier to entry

issues.issue: No social proof visible above the fold - missing user reviews, ratings, download counts, or trust badges
issues.recommendation: Add App Store rating, number of users, or testimonial snippet directly below CTAs

issues.issue: Vague value proposition - 'free up a ton of space' lacks specificity
issues.recommendation: Include specific metrics like 'Average users free up 74GB' to make claims tangible

issues.issue: Cookie consent banner partially obscures page content and lacks clear accept/reject options
issues.recommendation: Add explicit Accept/Reject buttons and reduce banner height

issues.issue: The '30' in money-back guarantee appears as a small badge that may be overlooked
issues.recommendation: Make the 30-day guarantee more prominent with clearer typography

friction_points: Users may hesitate without seeing what the app actually looks like in action
No indication of pricing before clicking Buy Now creates uncertainty
Unclear what happens after the 7-day free trial ends
No feature list visible to help users understand specific capabilities
best_practices_missing: Product screenshots or demo video showing the interface
Trust indicators (press logos, security certifications, App Store badges)
Comparison with built-in Mac tools or competitors
quick_wins: Add 'As featured in...' press logo bar below hero section
Include App Store rating badge near CTAs
Add small text under free trial CTA clarifying 'No credit card required'
Display a single compelling statistic (e.g., '10M+ Macs cleaned')
